marshal_hardening.title: Hardening drills
marshal_hardening.dialog: We can drill the provinces before the next calamity. It costs little now and softens the blow later.

approve.label: Approve
approve.hint: Next calamity happiness hit ×0.85 for 28 days

marshal_martial_order.title: Martial order
marshal_martial_order.dialog: A distressed region needs lockdown corridors. Health may stabilize — happiness will not.

marshal_morale_patrol.title: Morale patrol
marshal_morale_patrol.dialog: My riders can show the colors in the worst province. Spirits rise — a few will resent the boots.
